All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
CreatePageIT
Test that a page can be successfully created on the author instance.
GetPageIT
Test that some paths exist out-of-the-box on the author service.
GraphQLEndpointIT
Tests the existence of GraphQL endpoints
GraphQLIT
GraphQL tests.
HtmlUnitClient
AEM client that maintains a WebClient instance from HTMLUnit framework
PublishPageValidationIT
Validates pages on publish and makes sure that the page renders completely and also validates all linked resources (images, clientlibs etc).
